calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories, Set One (Motions)
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PETCO ANIMAL SUPPLIES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories, Set One:

Defendant Petco's first motion to compel re interrogatories, set one is granted in part and denied in part. No opposition filed. Plaintiff Jacqueline Lane shall provide verified, code-compliant further responses to: 1) Defendant Petco's first set of Form Interrogatories, Nos. 8.7, 8.8, 11.1, 12.1-12.3, 14.1, and 14.2 and 2) Defendant Petco's first set of Special Interrogatories, Nos. 3-10, 13, 14, and 16 on or before November 22, 2022. Defendant Petco's motion as to the general objections is denied without prejudice as Defendant Petco's separate statement did not include any said general objections. CRC 3.1345; Mills v. U.S. Bank, 166 Cal. App. 4th 871, 892-893 (2008). Defendant Petco's request for sanctions is denied without prejudice as the notice of motion as to sanctions is defective in that it does not specify the party against whom sanctions are sought.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION TO COMPEL INDENTIFICATION/PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PETCO ANIMAL SUPPLIES, INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL IDENTIFICATION/PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS is granted in part and denied in part. No opposition filed. Plaintiff Jacqueline Lane shall provide verified, code-compliant further responses to Defendant Petco's first set of Request for Production of Documents Nos. 1-6, and 8-22 on or before November 22, 2022. Defendant Petco's request for sanctions is denied without prejudice as the notice of motion as to sanctions is defective in that it does not specify the party against whom sanctions are sought.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
